known_values.description: 3pc 500 Gram Finale Set is designed to leave your audience in awe with 108 shots in rapid succession. These 3 Cakes, totaling 1,500 Grams, are designed to produce a coordinated 30 second, finale. With 1500Gs, this Finale Set of Gold Ti Willow w/NEON pearls (Red, Blue and Silver)
